title: Spatiotemporal Distribution in Rainfall and Temperature from CMIP6 Models: A Downscaling and Correction Study in a Semi-Arid Region of Mexico
description: SpeakForWater Episode 1: Spatiotemporal Distribution in Rainfall and Temperature from CMIP6 Models: A Downscaling and Correction Study in a Semi-Arid Region of Mexico. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
